1060601.name: Cleanup Mastery
1060601.desc: If at 5+ Charge Count at the start of the combat phase, gain 2 Haste next turn

1060621.name: Train Cleanup Manual
1060621.desc: An ally with the slowest Speed gains 2 Haste next turn if at 5+ Charge Count at the start of the combat phase
